  "findings": [
    "Unprotected trench depth is 5 feet or greater with workers actively inside",
    "Lack of cave-in protection system (sloping, shoring, or shielding)"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Order all workers to evacuate the trench immediately",
    "Stop all work in the immediate vicinity of the trench",
    "Install an engineered protective system (trench box, shoring, or proper sloping) before allowing re-entry",
    "Verify a competent person inspects the trench and protective system prior to resuming work"
  ],
  "rationale": "Entering an unprotected trench 5 feet or deeper violates OSHA standards and poses an immediate, life-threatening cave-in hazard to workers.",
  "references": [
    "OSHA 1926.652(a)(1)"
  ]
}
